title: Fit test - Disconnecting earbuds during Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test does not properly handle earbud disconnection during test on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with earbuds connected.
2. Navigate to App Settings → Onboarding / User Guides → Fit Test.
4. During the Fit Test, disconnect one earbud by placing it in the charging case.
6. Tap Retry to restart the Fit Test.
7. During the second Fit Test, disconnect both earbuds by placing them in the charging case.
expected: 1) When one earbud is disconnected: The disconnected earbud becomes greyed out with a yellow icon and "Fail" tag; the connected earbud shows proper icon and tag; text "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test" is displayed. 2) When both earbuds are disconnected: Both earbuds are greyed out with yellow icon and "Fail" tag; text "The earbuds were disconnected during the fit test" is displayed.
